prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Create a preventive inspection work order for transformer T-013 for the next maintenance cycle, including priority, required skills, and estimated downtime.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should produce a structured work order containing asset ID, task summary, priority, required technician skill set, and estimated downtime.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] get_asset_metadata — Identify the transformer and its current status
  Step 2: [wo] estimate_downtime — Determine the required maintenance and estimated downtime (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [wo] create_work_order — Create a preventive inspection work order (depends on steps [1, 2])
  Step 4: [wo] update_work_order — Assign the required skills and priority to the work order (depends on steps [3])
  Step 5: [wo] get_fault_record — Review and finalize the work order (depends on steps [4])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Identify the transformer and its current status",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "get_asset_metadata",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-013"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-013\",\n  \"manufacturer\": \"GE\",\n  \"location\": \"Distribution Center 2\",\n  \"voltage_class\": \"33kV/11kV\",\n  \"rating_kva\": 500,\n  \"install_date\": \"2018-09-10\",\n  \"age_years\": 6,\n  \"health_status\": 1,\n  \"fdd_category\": 2,\n  \"rul_days\": 922,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Step 1 completed successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Determine the required maintenance and estimated downtime",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "estimate_downtime",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-013",
      "severity": "low",
      "fault_type": null
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"severity\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": null,\n  \"estimated_min_hours\": 2,\n  \"estimated_max_hours\": 6,\n  \"estimated_typical_hours\": 4,\n  \"source\": \"dataset_statistics_baseline\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Step 2 completed successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Create a preventive inspection work order",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "create_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-013",
      "issue_description": "Preventive inspection for transformer T-013",
      "priority": "low",
      "fault_type": null,
      "estimated_downtime_hours": 4
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-BF6BA07A\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Preventive inspection for transformer T-013\",\n  \"priority\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": null,\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 4.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T10:50:53.662122Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Work order created successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Assign the required skills and priority to the work order",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "update_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "work_order_id": "WO-BF6BA07A",
      "priority": "low",
      "assigned_technician": null,
      "note": "Preventive inspection for transformer T-013, required skills: electrical engineering, estimated downtime: 4 hours"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"error\": \"Work order 'WO-BF6BA07A' not found in this session.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": "Work order 'WO-BF6BA07A' not found in this session.",
    "success": false,
    "verifier_decision": "error",
    "verifier_reason": "Work order 'WO-BF6BA07A' not found in this session."
  },
  {
    "step": 5,
    "task": "Review and finalize the work order",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "get_fault_record",
    "tool_args": {
      "fault_id": "WO-BF6BA07A"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"error\": \"Fault record 'WO-BF6BA07A' not found.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": "Fault record 'WO-BF6BA07A' not found.",
    "success": false,
    "verifier_decision": "error",
    "verifier_reason": "Fault record 'WO-BF6BA07A' not found."
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
A preventive inspection work order (WO-BF6BA07A) was created for transformer T-013 with a priority of "low" and an estimated downtime of 4 hours. However, due to errors, the required skills and final assignment of the work order could not be completed. The work order is currently in an "open" status with no assigned technician.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": false, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": false, "suggestions": "Improve error handling for work order updates and fault record retrieval"}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve error handling for work order updates and fault record retrieval
